children.heading: Areas designated as class I
children.label: a Areas designated as class I

children.text: national wilderness areas which exceed 5,000 acres in size,
national memorial parks which exceed 5,000 acres in size, and
national parks which exceed six thousand acres in size,

children.heading: Areas designated as class II
children.label: b Areas designated as class II
children.text: All areas in such State designated pursuant to as attainment or unclassifiable which are not established as class I under subsection (a) shall be class II areas unless redesignated under .section 7407(d) of this titlesection 7474 of this title
